title: Hillary Clinton calls Trump selfish in speech endorsing Harris: Watch
shortDescription: Hillary Clinton emphasized Monday night that Kamala Harris is the one to defeat Donald Trump this election year. Watch Clinton's full speech here.

title: Watch: UAW President Shawn Fain calls Trump a 'scab', supports Harris
shortDescription: United Auto Workers President Shawn Fain endorsed Kamala Harris during the opening night of the DNC in Chicago.

title: 'Two-bit, union-buster': Watch AOC speech slamming Trump at DNC Monday
shortDescription: New York Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez spoke at the Democratic National Convention Monday night. Watch her full speech here.

title: Trump's Taylor Swift AI drama amuses Gen Z Democrats at Chicago's DNC
shortDescription: “I feel like if Taylor were to endorse Harris, that would have a huge effect on the youth," said 24-year-old Democrat Elisa Calderon.

title: Trump claims Taylor Swift endorsed him through reposted AI image
shortDescription: Did Taylor Swift really endorse Trump for president? Donald Trump reposted a post artificial intelligence in his re-election bid for the White House.

title: Donald Trump (mostly) sticks to the script on Harris; will that last?
shortDescription: Starting a rally on time? Trying to stick to his campaign script? As Democrats launch their convention, what is going on with Donald Trump?

title: Can Harris win support from voters calling for a cease-fire in Gaza?
shortDescription: A coalition of pro-Palestinian protesters outside of the Democratic National Convention shared whether Vice President Kamala Harris has their votes.

title: George Santos pleads guilty, What is expelled congressman accused of?
shortDescription: Here's a look at all the allegations against Santos, who pleaded guilty to two of the 23 charges against him after reaching an agreement with prosecutors.
